args: Use plugin tools to start consuming workflow messages from RabbitMQ queue 'openai_test_queue'. Required target is plugins.integrations.pika_plugin::PikaPlugin.start_consuming_workflows. Use constructor_args: {"host":"localhost","port":5672,"virtual_host":"/","username":"guest","password":"guest"}. Use args: [{"queue_name":"openai_test_queue","max_messages":1,"stop_after_seconds":15.0,"poll_interval_seconds":1.0,"declare_queue":true,"durable":true,"max_retries":2,"dead_letter_queue":"openai_test_queue_dlq","prefetch_count":1}]. After tool execution, return a short confirmation with queue name, processed_messages, and status.
